display_text: Viper Aghanim's Scepter: Nosedive — Counters clustered enemy formations by applying Corrosive Skin to all enemies in an AoE, transforming Viper into a disruptive teamfight presence that punishes grouped enemies with area denial and damage amplification.
search_text: Viper Aghanim Scepter Nosedive AoE teamfight Corrosive Skin area denial counter-clustering

display_text: Viper Aghanim's Shard: Poison Attack — Counters high-armor targets and structures by reducing armor per stack, shifting Viper into a potent siege hero capable of weakening buildings and tanky frontliners over sustained engagements.
search_text: Viper Aghanim Shard Poison Attack armor reduction siege building damage anti-tank
